query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bridge_academy_quiz_answers (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  submissionId INT NOT NULL,
  questionId INT NOT NULL,
  studentAnswer VARCHAR(255),
  isCorrect BOOLEAN,
  pointsEarned INT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (submissionId) REFERENCES bridge_academy_quiz_submissions(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (questionId) REFERENCES bridge_academy_quiz_questions(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
